description: Fix RecipeListComponent stuck on loading state with OnPush change detection. The component has ChangeDetectionStrategy.OnPush but does not inject ChangeDetectorRef or call markForCheck() after the async subscribe callbacks complete - so Angular never re-renders the component after data loads. The pattern to apply is already present in RecipeDetailComponent (fixed in commit c3296b4). Apply the identical fix to RecipeListComponent.
steps: In apps/web/src/app/recipes/recipe-list.component.ts, add ChangeDetectorRef to the import from '@angular/core' (it already imports ChangeDetectionStrategy, Component, OnInit)
Inject ChangeDetectorRef in the constructor: add 'private readonly cdr: ChangeDetectorRef' as a constructor parameter
In the ngOnInit subscribe 'next' callback, add 'this.cdr.markForCheck();' after 'this.loading = false;'
In the ngOnInit subscribe 'error' callback, add 'this.cdr.markForCheck();' after 'this.loading = false;'
acceptance_criteria: RecipeListComponent constructor injects ChangeDetectorRef as 'private readonly cdr'
ngOnInit subscribe 'next' callback calls this.cdr.markForCheck() after updating state
ngOnInit subscribe 'error' callback calls this.cdr.markForCheck() after updating state
Pattern matches exactly what RecipeDetailComponent does (reference: apps/web/src/app/recipes/recipe-detail.component.ts)
verification: Run: cd /projects/sandbox/recipe-manager && pnpm nx lint web -- --no-cache
Review diff: git diff to confirm ChangeDetectorRef import, constructor injection, and markForCheck() calls in both callbacks
findings: Applied identical ChangeDetectorRef injection and markForCheck() pattern from RecipeDetailComponent. Added ChangeDetectorRef to @angular/core import, injected as 'private readonly cdr' in constructor, and called this.cdr.markForCheck() after this.loading = false in both next and error callbacks. Lint passes (pnpm nx lint web -- --no-cache). Note: pnpm/node required sourcing ~/.nvm/nvm.sh to be available in PATH.
